texto: It took me a really long time to decide who I want my circle to be and who I want to surround myself with. Once you make that choice, that is where I feel like I have built my strength. This is my life choice. These are the people that make me feel good about me, and that I love and adore and will do anything for.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Katie Aselton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “It took me a really long time to decide who I want my circle to be and who I want to surround mys…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, love, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de vida e time.

texto: I think there are certain tenets set in place for all different types on genres. For thrillers, women usually die first. I can't say exactly why, and it's kind of a bummer... But I also can't explain why the wallflower girl in the romantic comedy always gets the guy in the end. That's just the way those movies go.

texto: I have respect for anyone who's going to go out and make a movie for a small budget and turn it into a phenomenon. God bless you. Please keep making movies. That's great. But it's not what entertains me.

texto: Okay, sense of humor: plus one. Being able to laugh at yourself: plus one. Being able to laugh at other people without being mean: plus one. Vanity: minus one.
